name: AGP Corporation
summary: AGP Corporation supports airports infrastructure in Japan. The company supplies electricity, air conditioning, and compressed air to the aircraft; and designs, constructs, and operates power supply equipment for aircraft. It also maintains passenger, baggage handling systems, distribution systems, and moving sidewalks; and airport facilities, such as aircraft hangars, goods shed buildings, etc. In addition, the company offers maintenance and management services for security inspection devices, such as X-ray machines, metal detectors, explosive detecting equipment, liquid inspecting devises, etc. at on and off airport sites. Further, it develops, manufactures, and sells food carts, such as re-heating, warm storage, cold storage, and transportation carts; produces and sells low-potassium vegetables; and offers support services to various business aircraft operators at Narita International Airport. The company was formerly known as Japan Airport Ground Power Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AGP Corporation in September 2000. AGP Corporation was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
